generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about alliance commitments, but let's be real - our security depends on these partnerships. Without them, we're left vulnerable to emerging threats. It's not just about burden-sharing; it's about having allies we can count on when things get tough. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
